headers.Поставкипродуктовпитанияоптомдляресторан: Wholesale food supplies for restaurants, markets and distributors

home.доставка_описание_1: Our delivery service offers flexible terms. We guarantee fast delivery in Moscow and the region the next day after placing an order.
home.доставка_описание_2: GPS technology provides accurate tracking of your order so you always know its location on the map.
home.доставка_факт_1: Delivery from 50 kg in Moscow and the region
home.доставка_факт_2: We deliver the next day after the order
home.менеджер_описание: Our sales department has over 20 highly qualified specialists! Find your personal manager to help you make the right choice.
home.преимущество_1_заголовок: Deferred payment from the first delivery
home.преимущество_1_описание: Start cooperation confidently with the option of deferred payment
home.преимущество_2_описание: Evaluate our product quality by receiving free samples for thorough testing
home.преимущество_3_описание: Save on delivery starting from minimum order volumes
home.преимущество_4_описание: Guaranteed stable prices for tender participants
home.преимущество_5_заголовок: We’ll offer cheaper if you find a lower price
home.преимущество_5_описание: We are confident in our competitive prices. If you find lower prices, we will offer an even better deal.
home.преимущество_6_описание: Try our products risk-free. If you are not satisfied, we will refund 100% of the test delivery cost.
home.самое_главное_заголовок_опыт: Our experience and reputation are the most important
home.пункт_кабинет_описание: A convenient personal account to manage and place your orders
home.о_компании_заголовок: Ekor is a large manufacturing and trading company producing and selling fish and seafood
home.о_компании_описание_1: Since 1998, Ekor has offered a wide range of frozen fish, ready-made products and other food items. The company operates over 40 refrigerated trucks for fast delivery across Moscow and the region. Total turnover exceeds 2.5 billion rubles per year, with over 100 employees and more than 3,000 regular customers.
home.о_компании_описание_2: Ekor offers a wide selection of fish and seafood wholesale with delivery for orders from 15,000 rubles. It provides direct supplies from various regions and countries, deferred payment, competitive prices and transparent accounting. The company’s wholesale price chat bot lets you quickly request and compare prices.
home.самое_главное_заголовок_программы: Our participation in the programs “Natural Selection” and “Kitchen”
home.участие_в_программе_текст: Our participation in the program “Natural Selection” on the “TVC” channel
home.отзывы_описание: Read real reviews on the website or leave yours on Yandex Maps
